meaning: adj.蜈ｫ蛟咲噪,蜈ｫ螻ら噪adv.蜈ｫ蛟榊慍,蜈ｫ螻ょ慍
examples: Currently, these foresee an approximate eightfold expansion within just nine years.
Sales of Audi's flagship, the A8, have jumped eightfold since being redesigned a year ago.
In the last year, Facebook has grown eightfold, to eight million users, in Brazil, where Orkut has 28 million.
Under the late Emerson Kampen, Great Lakes' shares rose eightfold between 1987 and 1993.
According to SIPRI, arms deliveries to Malaysia jumped eightfold in 2005-09, compared with the previous five years.
